description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet or shelf unit featuring a combination of white and natural wood finishes. The main body is a long, white rectangular box with a flat top surface suitable for placing items. On one end, there is a wooden cubical section that includes an open shelf and a drawer, providing both open and closed storage options. The front face of the white section has a recessed area, likely for additional storage or media equipment, and the wooden section's drawer is flush with the surface, giving a sleek appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living rooms. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet or shelf with a white main body and a natural wood side section featuring an open shelf and a drawer. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The cabinet is viewed from the narrow white end, showing a solid, featureless white face.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the full length of the cabinet, highlighting the white main section and the wooden cubical end with an open shelf.
description_view_2: The wooden end is fully visible, showing a plain wood surface with no openings or features.
description_view_3: The front view displays the recessed area in the white section and the wooden section with a visible drawer and open shelf.
